description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.4.2 Docker image and a global before_script that installs bundler (gem install bundler --no-document) and runs bundle install with parallel jobs. Define three jobs: audit, rspec, and rubocop, each running in the default test stage. The audit job executes bundle audit check --update. The rspec job runs bundle exec rspec. The rubocop job runs bundle exec rubocop. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are needed.
